added.title: Haulin' n' Ballin'
added.description: The fate of Priya and Caleb's relationship hangs in the balance as Zee struggles to keep a secret. And it all plays out during a brutal game of human pinball.

added.title: Breaking Up Is Hard To Do
added.description: Caleb is desperate to put his relationship with Priya back together while the campers tear apart the largest objects they can find.

added.title: Circling The Drain
added.description: Julia gets between Caleb and Priya during the most painful memory game of all time.

added.title: Working K9 to 5
added.description: Release the hounds! Campers are hunted by a pack of fearsome attack dogs. And one pug.

added.title: Off The Hook
added.description: Things get scary when campers are pulled into a fishhook challenge that pits them against each other AND their worst fears.

added.title: Creature Mysteries
added.description: Ranger Tabes tells the Bears she's been investigating a mysterious creature. But when the Bears realize she's actually investigating their friend Charlie, they split up to ensure Charlie's safety.

added.title: The Library
added.description: The Bears find Chloe in the library exhausted from studying for an exam all day. The Bears stay to help Chloe study but make things worse in the process.

added.title: Grizz Helps
added.description: When his brothers don't need his help for the day, Grizz leaves the cave to assist anyone he can throughout the city.

added.title: Christmas Parties
added.description: The Bears have been invited to all their friends' Christmas parties. In an effort to have time to crash Nom Nom's huge star-studded bash, the Bears first try to make quick stops at all their friends' parties throughout the night.

added.title: Grizzly the Movie
added.description: Grizz gets cast in a movie about a Grizzly Bear! But Grizz soon realizes the movie's depiction of grizzly bears is not what he had in mind.

added.title: Oscar and the Monsters Chapter 2: Tiny Outburst Society
added.description: After discovering that young Mortimer doesn't have any friends, Oscar helps him start a new club on campus. But the monsters are forced to hide their newfound friendship from the school - and Stuart.

added.title: Oscar and the Monsters Chapter 3: Witches' Brew
added.description: Mortimer and the monsters must figure out how to send Oscar back to his own time, but the only person that can help is the foe of monsters everywhere: a witch. Will they all be able to work together to get Oscar back to Hedgehog?

added.title: The Babies Chapter 1: Breakfast Errands
added.description: Frustrated that he doesn't know his magical identity, Oliver convinces Susie to tell him by means of nonviolent protest. Not wanting anyone in her house, Susie takes Oliver on a series of errands to help him figure it out.

added.title: The Babies Chapter 2: Teacup Giant
added.description: Susie sends Alexa to the Fjords to train as a giant, but her small size causes her to lag behind. Will Alexa be able to fake it until she makes it - or are these boots too enormous to fill?

added.title: The Babies Chapter 3: Lem Is Nothing
added.description: After landing in trouble with Susie, Lem runs away to Frozen Time to hide at Ramona's but is soon sniffed out by the fearsome Jabberwock. Later, Lem must decide whose wrath is worse: that of the Jabberwock, or a very grumpy Suze.

removed.title: Cellie
removed.description: Fed up with sharing, Panda forbids his brothers from using his cellphone any longer. But when the brothers get their own super advanced smartphones, Panda starts to succumb to crippling jealousy.

removed.title: Ranger Tabes
removed.description: To recover a missing package, the Bears get help from Ranger Tabes, an eccentric forest ranger. But her overblown sense of justice might be too much for the Bears to handle.

removed.title: Nom Nom's Entourage
removed.description: Nom Nom recruits the Bears to act as his entourage of friends. But when the Bears realize Nom Nom doesn't understand friendship, they decide to kick their day of bonding into high gear.

removed.title: Rooms
removed.description: The Bears switch bedrooms for the night and get a glimpse of the living space of one of their brothers. But the deeper they go, hidden secrets are revealed.

removed.title: Losing Ice
removed.description: Feeling unappreciated, Ice Bear leaves his brothers to be the chef of a restaurant. Desperate to fill the void, Grizz and Panda look for Ice Bear's replacement.

removed.title: The Wheel of Vomit
removed.description: Chef finally gets to show off his fancy culinary skills in an eating challenge where each dish is a tastebud's nightmare. The last camper still eating wins immunity. The rest are all up for elimination.

removed.title: Paddle Field Earth
removed.description: Today's challenge involves canoeing, hiking and mountain climbing. It's just like normal summer camp!! Except that you canoe over a waterfall, hike through a geyser field and climb a mountain that's actually the world's biggest beehive. It's nothing like summer camp.

removed.title: The Truth, The Pole Truth and Nothing But the Truth
removed.description: If spending the day balancing on a pole under the direct sun with no food in your tummy sounds like a fun time you are going to love today's challenge.

removed.title: Launch Back of Notre Game
removed.description: Catapult your team member into distant scoring zones to earn points but if you miss you'll be landing in a penalty zone filled with all kind of evil. The first team to reach 10,000 points wins. The losing team, as always, will be sending someone home.

removed.title: Severe Eggs & Pains
removed.description: Chris responds to the network's ask for a holiday special by making the campers hunt for eggs. With the teams now merged it's all about being the first one back with an egg and winning immunity. Well, and not getting gutted by a giant bird.
